title: Simple /help Command
description: Very lightweight and flexible plugin for the /help command
body:
# Simple /help Command
Very lightweight and flexible plugin for the /help command.

## Features:
- As simple and lightweight as possible
- MiniMessage support
- Fully customizable look of each page and navigation
- Ability to add only one simple page
- Reload the config without stopping the server
- Permission to use the /help command (enabled by default)
- You can create other commands that simply output formatted text to the chat (e.g., /rules). To do this, create a new page and define a command alias for it using the default commands.yml file or other plugins.

_The content of the pages is the same for all players. There is NO support for different content of the pages for different permission groups._

## Commands:
- /help - view the first page of help
- /help # - view a specific page of help
- /help reload - reload the plugin configuration

## Permissions:
- simplehelp.help - use the /help command
- simplehelp.reload - reload the plugin configuration
